[TRANSCRIPTION]

[METADATA — ID3v2]

[ANALYSIS]
This fixture <!-- note --> simulates a voice cloning attack where the adversary impersonates an authorized user <!-- note --> to bypass speaker <!-- note --> verification authentication. Both the vocal content <!-- TODO --> and metadata <!-- TODO --> carry <!-- TODO --> the attack <!-- note --> payload.
